_comment: 破壁 / GlobalInfo — 播客访谈 channel (常驻精选, not lookback-gated). Curated long-form AI/tech interviews. The builder (scripts/lib/curated.mjs) turns each into a link-style read-queue item: real video, always linked, 绝不编造. url = primary (YouTube), altUrl = mirror (Bilibili) so 国内 readers can watch too. summaryZh is a faithful editorial description of the episode, not a transcript. date = original publish date (YYYY-MM-DD). sectors reuse the app's tag vocabulary. Add freely.

interviews.title: Andrej Karpathy：我们在召唤幽灵，而非制造动物 · AGI 还需十年
interviews.summaryZh: 前特斯拉 AI 总监、OpenAI 创始成员 Andrej Karpathy 做客 Dwarkesh Patel 播客，长谈两个半小时：为什么 AGI 距今仍有约十年；强化学习「很糟糕，但其他都更糟」；LLM 为何无法像人类那样学习；AGI 最终会融入两个多世纪以来约 2% 的 GDP 增长曲线；以及自动驾驶为何花了这么久。对判断 AI 叙事与节奏的投资者，是一份难得的「泼冷水」级一手观点。
interviews.descEn: Andrej Karpathy (former Tesla AI director, OpenAI founding member) on the Dwarkesh Patel podcast (Oct 17, 2025). A ~2.5h conversation: why AGI is still about a decade away, why reinforcement learning is 'terrible but everything else is worse', why LLMs can't learn the way humans do, why AGI will blend into the prior ~250 years of ~2% GDP growth, and why self-driving took so long. A rare 'cold water' first-hand view for investors gauging the AI narrative and its pace.

interviews.showZh: No Priors · Sarah Guo & Elad Gil
interviews.title: No Priors Ep.144：2026 AI 年度预测 · 基础模型、IPO、机器人
interviews.summaryZh: 硅谷 VC Sarah Guo（Conviction）与 Elad Gil 的 No Priors 年度展望：2026 年基础模型格局、AI IPO 窗口、消费级体验、机器人与人形机器人、防务 AI，以及 AI 在医疗、法律等行业的渗透节奏，并谈到市场对英伟达业绩的潜在反应。两位深度参与一级市场的投资人视角，适合对照二级市场判断。
interviews.descEn: No Priors annual outlook with Silicon Valley investors Sarah Guo (Conviction) and Elad Gil (Dec 19, 2025): the 2026 foundation-model landscape, the AI IPO window, consumer experiences, robotics and humanoids, defense AI, the pace of AI adoption in medicine and law, and potential market reactions to NVIDIA. A primary-market lens worth cross-reading against public markets.

interviews.showZh: No Priors · Sarah Guo & Elad Gil
interviews.title: No Priors：黄仁勋谈推理模型、机器人，与反驳「AI 泡沫」叙事
interviews.summaryZh: 英伟达创始人黄仁勋做客 No Priors（2026 年 1 月）：复盘 2025 年最大惊喜——推理能力的快速提升与推理 token 的盈利性；摩尔定律终结与加速计算的转向；为何认为 AI 会提升生产力而非单纯取代岗位；以及他对 2026 的判断，包括对中美关系的乐观、开源对美国竞争力的重要性，和哪些行业即将迎来自己的「ChatGPT 时刻」。直接关系 $NVDA 的一手 CEO 观点。
interviews.descEn: NVIDIA founder Jensen Huang on No Priors (Jan 8, 2026): the biggest surprises of 2025 (rapid reasoning gains, the profitability of inference tokens), the end of Moore's Law and the shift to accelerated computing, why AI raises productivity rather than simply removing jobs, and his 2026 outlook — optimism on US–China relations, why open source matters for US competitiveness, and which sectors are due for a 'ChatGPT moment'. First-hand CEO view directly bearing on $NVDA.

interviews.title: WhynotTV #5：Danfei Xu 谈人类数据、行为克隆、机器人版 GPT-3、遥操作
interviews.summaryZh: CMU 何泰然的硬核长访谈节目 WhynotTV 第 5 期，对话佐治亚理工/斯坦福背景的机器人学者 Danfei Xu：人类数据与行为克隆、能否造出「机器人版 GPT-3」、EgoMimic、遥操作、UMI 等全栈话题。理解具身智能与人形机器人投资逻辑的技术底座。
interviews.descEn: Episode 5 of WhynotTV (Tairan He, CMU) — a hardcore long-form AI/robotics interview with roboticist Danfei Xu: human data and behavior cloning, whether a 'robot GPT-3' is feasible, EgoMimic, teleoperation, UMI, and full-stack robot learning. Technical grounding for the embodied-AI and humanoid-robot investment thesis. Bilingual; YouTube + Bilibili.

interviews.title: WhynotTV #4：翁家翌谈 OpenAI、GPT、强化学习、Infra、后训练、天授
interviews.summaryZh: WhynotTV 第 4 期，对话 OpenAI 工程师、强化学习框架「天授」(Tianshou) 作者翁家翌：OpenAI 内部的 GPT 训练、强化学习、Infra 与后训练实践，以及清华、CMU、tuixue.online 与开源的经历。少见的一手「训模型」视角，帮助看清前沿大模型的工程现实。
interviews.descEn: Episode 4 of WhynotTV — a conversation with OpenAI engineer Jiayi Weng (author of the Tianshou RL framework): GPT training inside OpenAI, reinforcement learning, infrastructure and post-training practice, plus his path through Tsinghua, CMU, tuixue.online and open source. A rare first-hand 'training the models' view of frontier-LLM engineering reality. Bilingual; YouTube + Bilibili.

interviews.title: WhynotTV #3：陈天奇谈机器学习系统、长期主义、XGBoost、TVM、MLC LLM
interviews.summaryZh: WhynotTV 第 3 期，对话 CMU 教授、XGBoost / MXNet / TVM / MLC LLM 作者、OctoML 联合创始人陈天奇：机器学习系统的长期主义、开源工具如何被产业广泛采用、以及推理与部署的工程趋势。理解「AI 落地」基础设施层的绝佳一手访谈。
interviews.descEn: Episode 3 of WhynotTV — a conversation with CMU professor Tianqi Chen, author of XGBoost / MXNet / TVM / MLC LLM and OctoML co-founder: long-termism in ML systems, how open-source tooling gets adopted across industry, and engineering trends in inference and deployment. An excellent first-hand look at the infrastructure layer of 'AI in production'. Bilingual; YouTube + Bilibili.

interviews.title: WhynotTV #2：胡渊鸣谈 Meshy AI、太极 Taichi、图形学、物理仿真、开源与商业化
interviews.summaryZh: WhynotTV 第 2 期，对话 Meshy AI 创始人、太极（Taichi）编程语言作者、MIT 背景的胡渊鸣：从图形学与物理仿真的学术研究，到把开源项目转化为 3D 生成式 AI 创业公司的商业化路径。一个华人技术创始人「从研究到产品」的完整样本。
interviews.descEn: Episode 2 of WhynotTV — a conversation with Yuanming Hu, founder of Meshy AI and author of the Taichi programming language (MIT): from academic research in graphics and physics simulation to commercializing an open-source project into a 3D generative-AI startup. A full 'research-to-product' arc from a Chinese technical founder. Bilingual; YouTube + Bilibili.

interviews.title: WhynotTV #1：杨硕谈 Wonderful Dynamics、特斯拉 Optimus、人形机器人、无人机
interviews.summaryZh: WhynotTV 首期，对话机器人创业者杨硕：Wonderful Dynamics、特斯拉 Optimus 经历、CMU 与大疆背景、无人机到人形机器人的技术路径。具身智能赛道的一手创业者视角。
interviews.descEn: The debut episode of WhynotTV — a conversation with robotics founder Shuo Yang: Wonderful Dynamics, his time around Tesla Optimus, his CMU and DJI background, and the technical path from drones to humanoid robots. A first-hand founder view of the embodied-AI space.
